species: Efforts to develop broadly protective vaccines against pathogenic Escherichia coli are ongoing.
disease_state: Ten (48%) of the 21 volunteers developed diarrhea.
sample_source: serum and intestinal lavage samples from 21 volunteers

we estimated the proportion of anti-YghJ IgA antibodies that targeted glycosylated epitopes in serum and intestinal lavage samples from 21 volunteers experimentally infected with wild-type enterotoxigenic E. coli (ETEC) strain TW10722.
age: 21 healthy adult volunteers aged between 18 and 40 years...
strain: ETEC strain TW10722 (O115:H5; GenBank BioProject: PRJNA59745) was isolated in 1997 in Guinea-Bissau from a 15-month-old child...
